access_meeting_notes_and_transcripts_fro: Access meeting notes and transcripts from Granola
filter_notes_created_after_this_date: Filter notes created after this date
filter_notes_created_before_this_date: Filter notes created before this date
filter_notes_updated_after_this_date: Filter notes updated after this date
folders_a_note_s_folder_memberships_id_n: Folders — a note’s folder memberships (id, name) for Get Note, or the workspace folder listing (id, name, parentFolderId) for List Folders
integrate_granola_into_your_workflow_to_: Integrate Granola into your workflow to retrieve meeting notes, summaries, attendees, and transcripts.
list_of_meeting_notes_id_title_ownername: List of meeting notes (id, title, ownerName, ownerEmail, createdAt, updatedAt)
list_recent_granola_notes_and_produce_a_: List recent Granola notes and produce a structured digest of takeaways and action items.
meeting_transcript_entries_speaker_speak: Meeting transcript entries (speaker, speakerLabel, text, startTime, endTime)
